channel.title: CEDIS
channel.description: Discover the future of Software Engineering, Learning, and Artificial Intelligence. Since 2013, the Center for Studies, Development, and Innovation in Software has led innovative projects in research, development, and education.

item.title: Join CEDIS
item.description: Entry paths for research, supervision, and collaboration at CEDIS/UnB.

item.title: Knowledge map
item.description: Interactive graph connecting CEDIS areas of expertise, researchers, and projects.

item.title: Where our alumni are
item.description: Former advisees and members of CEDIS who moved on to research, industry, entrepreneurship, and teaching careers.

item.title: Which CEDIS area fits you?
item.description: 5 quick questions to discover which CEDIS area and researchers align best with your profile.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact information for CEDIS including address, email, and social media links.

item.title: Partners & recognitions
item.description: Institutions and labs CEDIS works with, awards received, and institutional milestones.

item.title: CEDIS History
item.description: From its origin as the Software Factory Laboratory to a center with partnerships, projects, and research platforms with visible impact.

item.title: CEDIS Infrastructure
item.description: Spaces, facilities, and computing resources available to support CEDIS research, meetings, and development activities.

item.title: Opportunities at CEDIS
item.description: Open calls, opportunities, and selection notices related to activities and projects at CEDIS.

item.title: About CEDIS
item.description: CEDIS is the Center for Studies, Development and Innovation in Software at the University of Brasilia. Since 2013 we've studied how software gets built — and who builds it.

item.title: Search the site
item.description: Search across all CEDIS content — researchers, projects, publications, and news.
